posts.author: bekkiwilson (Bekki Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community,

I have a portfolio of projects I am tracking on. A feature request that would be awesome is the ability to hide columns in one group, but not ALL groups in a board. Since that’s not yet a possibility (but hopefully on the backlog somewhere?), anyone have any fabulous ideas? My team prefers not to put the information into the discussion section and does want a document attachment (actually multiple documents). I am putting the documents column as the last column (furthest to the right for now). Any other ideas?
